list.name: mr_job_id
list.label: MR Job ID
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT job_id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT job_id FROM mr_job_metrics UNION SELECT DISTINCT job_id FROM mr_task_metrics) t ORDER BY job_id
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT job_id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT job_id FROM mr_job_metrics UNION SELECT DISTINCT job_id FROM mr_task_metrics) t ORDER BY job_id

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT job_id) AS value FROM (SELECT job_id FROM mr_job_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND job_id IN ($mr_job_id) UNION SELECT DISTINCT job_id FROM mr_task_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND job_id IN ($mr_job_id)) t

SELECT COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(elapsed_time_ms)), ROUND(AVG(cpu_time_ms))) AS value FROM (SELECT job_id, elapsed_time_ms, NULL as cpu_time_ms FROM mr_job_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND elapsed_time_ms IS NOT NULL AND job_id IN ($mr_job_id) UNION ALL SELECT job_id, NULL, cpu_time_ms FROM mr_task_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND cpu_time_ms IS NOT NULL AND job_id IN ($mr_job_id)) t

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT task_id) AS value FROM mr_task_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND task_type='map' AND job_id IN ($mr_job_id)

SELECT CONCAT(SUM(CASE WHEN task_type='map' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), ' map / ', SUM(CASE WHEN task_type='reduce' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), ' reduce') AS value FROM (SELECT DISTINCT task_id, task_type FROM mr_task_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND job_id IN ($mr_job_id)) t

SELECT (FLOOR(timestamp_ms / $__interval_ms) * $__interval_ms / 1000) AS time, SUM(map_output_bytes) AS 'Map Output Bytes' FROM mr_task_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND map_output_bytes IS NOT NULL AND job_id IN ($mr_job_id) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT (FLOOR(timestamp_ms / $__interval_ms) * $__interval_ms / 1000) AS time, SUM(reduce_shuffle_bytes) AS 'Reduce Shuffle Bytes' FROM mr_task_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND reduce_shuffle_bytes IS NOT NULL AND job_id IN ($mr_job_id) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT (FLOOR(timestamp_ms / $__interval_ms) * $__interval_ms / 1000) AS time, SUM(hdfs_bytes_read) AS 'HDFS Read' FROM (SELECT timestamp_ms, hdfs_bytes_read, job_id FROM mr_job_metrics UNION ALL SELECT timestamp_ms, hdfs_bytes_read, job_id FROM mr_task_metrics) combined WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND hdfs_bytes_read IS NOT NULL AND hdfs_bytes_read > 0 AND job_id IN ($mr_job_id) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT (FLOOR(timestamp_ms / $__interval_ms) * $__interval_ms / 1000) AS time, SUM(hdfs_bytes_written) AS 'HDFS Written' FROM (SELECT timestamp_ms, hdfs_bytes_written, job_id FROM mr_job_metrics UNION ALL SELECT timestamp_ms, hdfs_bytes_written, job_id FROM mr_task_metrics) combined WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND hdfs_bytes_written IS NOT NULL AND hdfs_bytes_written > 0 AND job_id IN ($mr_job_id) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT (FLOOR(timestamp_ms / $__interval_ms) * $__interval_ms / 1000) AS time, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN task_type='map' THEN task_id END) AS 'Map Tasks' FROM mr_task_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND job_id IN ($mr_job_id) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT (FLOOR(timestamp_ms / $__interval_ms) * $__interval_ms / 1000) AS time, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN task_type='reduce' THEN task_id END) AS 'Reduce Tasks' FROM mr_task_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND job_id IN ($mr_job_id) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT (FLOOR(timestamp_ms / $__interval_ms) * $__interval_ms / 1000) AS time, AVG(cpu_time_ms) AS 'Avg CPU Time' FROM (SELECT timestamp_ms, cpu_time_ms, job_id FROM mr_job_metrics WHERE cpu_time_ms IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT timestamp_ms, cpu_time_ms, job_id FROM mr_task_metrics WHERE cpu_time_ms IS NOT NULL) t WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND job_id IN ($mr_job_id) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT (FLOOR(timestamp_ms / $__interval_ms) * $__interval_ms / 1000) AS time, AVG(gc_time_ms) AS 'Avg GC Time' FROM (SELECT timestamp_ms, gc_time_ms, job_id FROM mr_job_metrics WHERE gc_time_ms IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT timestamp_ms, gc_time_ms, job_id FROM mr_task_metrics WHERE gc_time_ms IS NOT NULL) t WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND job_id IN ($mr_job_id) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT (FLOOR(timestamp_ms / $__interval_ms) * $__interval_ms / 1000) AS time, SUM(map_input_records) AS 'Map Input' FROM mr_task_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND map_input_records IS NOT NULL AND job_id IN ($mr_job_id) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT (FLOOR(timestamp_ms / $__interval_ms) * $__interval_ms / 1000) AS time, SUM(map_output_records) AS 'Map Output' FROM mr_task_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND map_output_records IS NOT NULL AND job_id IN ($mr_job_id) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT (FLOOR(timestamp_ms / $__interval_ms) * $__interval_ms / 1000) AS time, SUM(reduce_input_records) AS 'Reduce Input' FROM mr_task_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND reduce_input_records IS NOT NULL AND job_id IN ($mr_job_id) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT (FLOOR(timestamp_ms / $__interval_ms) * $__interval_ms / 1000) AS time, SUM(reduce_output_records) AS 'Reduce Output' FROM mr_task_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND reduce_output_records IS NOT NULL AND job_id IN ($mr_job_id) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT FROM_UNIXTIME(timestamp_ms/1000) AS time, job_id, job_name, user_name, state, elapsed_time_ms, launched_maps, launched_reduces, hdfs_bytes_read, hdfs_bytes_written, cpu_time_ms, gc_time_ms FROM mr_job_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND job_id IN ($mr_job_id) ORDER BY timestamp_ms DESC LIMIT 200

SELECT FROM_UNIXTIME(timestamp_ms/1000) AS time, task_id, task_type, job_id, map_input_records, map_output_records, map_output_bytes, reduce_input_records, reduce_output_records, reduce_shuffle_bytes, spilled_records, hdfs_bytes_read, hdfs_bytes_written FROM mr_task_metrics WHERE timestamp_ms >= ($__unixEpochFrom() * 1000) AND timestamp_ms <= ($__unixEpochTo() * 1000) AND job_id IN ($mr_job_id) ORDER BY timestamp_ms DESC LIMIT 200
